x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Virtual Agent is the primary delivery channel for Now Assist conversational AI. Without glide.cs.enabled=true, VA topics and Now Assist prompts cannot be surfaced to end users.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Set glide.cs.enabled=true in sys_properties. Confirm the Virtual Agent plugin is active. Both must be true before Now Assist conversational AI topics can be surfaced to end users.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_c203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c25
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Virtual Agent is the primary delivery channel for Now Assist conversational AI. Without glide.cs.enabled=true, VA topics and Now Assist prompts cannot be surfaced to end users.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Virtual Agent Active Status</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var checkPlugin = (function checkPlugin(storeScope, pluginSource) {    var result = { found: false, version: "", table: "" };    try {        var saGR = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");        saGR.addQuery("scope", storeScope);        saGR.setLimit(1);        saGR.query();        if (saGR.next()) {            result.found = true;            result.version = saGR.getValue("version") || "";            result.table = "sys_store_app";            return result;        }    } catch(e1) {}    if (pluginSource) {        try {            var spGR = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins");            spGR.addQuery("source", pluginSource);            spGR.addQuery("active", true);            spGR.setLimit(1);            spGR.query();            if (spGR.next()) {                result.found = true;                result.version = spGR.getValue("version") || "";                result.table = "sys_plugins";                return result;            }        } catch(e2) {}    }    return result;});
    var vaResult = checkPlugin("com.glide.cs.chatbot", "com.glide.cs.chatbot");
    // Functional fallback: sys_cs_topic table existence
    var pluginActive = vaResult.found;
    if (!pluginActive) {
        var testGr = new GlideRecord("sys_cs_topic");
        testGr.setLimit(1);
        testGr.query();
        pluginActive = testGr.isValid();
    }
    var prop = gs.getProperty("glide.cs.enabled", "false");
    var actualValue = "Plugin active: " + pluginActive + " | glide.cs.enabled: " + prop;
    if (pluginActive && prop === "true") {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: "Virtual Agent is active and glide.cs.enabled=true. Now Assist conversational AI prerequisites satisfied." };
    } else if (pluginActive) {
        return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: "Virtual Agent is active but glide.cs.enabled is not set to true. Set glide.cs.enabled=true in sys_properties." };
    } else {
        return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: "Virtual Agent (com.glide.cs.chatbot) is not active. Now Assist conversational AI requires Virtual Agent." };
    }
})()]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>ITSM</module>
<number>CHK0005959</number>
<order>200</order>
<remediation_guidance>Set glide.cs.enabled=true in sys_properties. Confirm the Virtual Agent plugin is active. Both must be true before Now Assist conversational AI topics can be surfaced to end users.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>c203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c25</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
